ChatPanel.description: CedarOS-powered conversational panel, used to instruct agents and view high-level interactions

AgentBrowser.description: Vertical scrollable list of available agents (Cleaner, Visualizer, etc.) with icons and quick actions

Canvas.description: Main drag-and-drop resizable area for opening and working with datasets, charts, and models

Window.features: plotly-powered, draggable, resizable, linkable to dataset columns
executed code snippets from agents or sandbox

AgentProposalTimeline.description: Timeline of agent suggestions (cleaning steps, models, visualizations). User can accept/decline, rollback, or compare proposals.

LiveSummaryStats.description: Always shows stats for the currently selected column(s) — mean, median, stddev, missing count, distributions

CorrelationMatrix.description: When multiple columns are selected, render correlation heatmap and highlight significant relationships

FileBrowser.description: List of uploaded datasets, processed versions, and generated files

UXGoals.Goal: Drag-resize canvas windows for flexible data science workflows
Intuitive left-sidebar separation of conversation (chat) and tools (agents)
Realtime updates from agents streamed directly to UI
Unique agent proposal timeline (like Git history but for data science steps)
Right sidebar contextual stats — always visible, dynamically updating
Maximize explainability: users see what each agent did and why
Support fullscreen focus mode for deep exploration

VisualIdentity.Colors: Neutral with highlights for agent activity
VisualIdentity.Animations: Framer Motion for smooth panel transitions
VisualIdentity.Interactivity: Canvas drag-resize, hover tooltips, contextual menus
